name: jinn-lang
description: Syntax highlighting and language server support for the Jinn programming language

jinn.lsp.enable.description: Enable the Jinn language server (jinnc-lsp) for diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, completion, references, rename, semantic tokens, and signature help. When disabled, syntax highlighting still works.

jinn.lsp.serverPath.description: Path to the jinnc-lsp executable. Absolute, or relative to a workspace folder. When empty, the extension looks for target/release/jinnc-lsp then target/debug/jinnc-lsp in each workspace folder, then falls back to 'jinnc-lsp' on PATH.
